"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\rift_cli.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\rift_cli.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\rift_cli.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\rift_cli.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o rift.exe -Wl,--out-implib,librift.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\rift_cli.dir\linkLibs.rsp
